partial_progress.details: Infrastructure fixes completed (imports, instances, lemmas). density_frame_condition_strict theorem structured but has 8 sorries. CantorApplication.lean has 3 sorries for NoMaxOrder, NoMinOrder, DenselyOrdered. Blocking issue: proving ¬CanonicalR W M (backward non-accessibility) for density intermediates.

errors.message: Cannot prove ¬CanonicalR W M (backward non-accessibility) for density intermediates. The G-formulas in W depend on Lindenbaum extension process which is hard to analyze.
errors.recommendation: Options: (1) Analyze Lindenbaum extension to prove G(neg(delta)) ∈ W, (2) Iterate density to force Case A, (3) Modify density witness seed construction
